name: Sample Tracker
description: A laboratory sample inventory tracker rendering biological or chemical samples with barcode identifiers, storage location tags, expiry countdowns, chain-of-custody logs, and status indicators across grid, freezer-map, or timeline views.

grid.description: Card-grid rendering of all samples with barcode, name, location, expiry, and status visible at a glance. Responsive grid adapts from 2 columns (mobile) to 6 columns (wide). Best for inventory browsing and search.

freezer.description: Physical freezer-box layout showing samples positioned in their actual storage coordinates (rack/box/row/column). Renders as a 9×9 grid mimicking cryobox positions with occupied/empty cell indicators.

timeline.description: Chronological chain-of-custody timeline showing every access event for each sample (who, when, what was done). Vertical timeline with custody events as nodes connecting back to the sample origin.

visual_brief: A scientific inventory view rendered as a responsive grid of SampleCards inside a d-section container. Each SampleCard is a d-surface with subtle border, padding 12px, and hover elevation. At the top of each card, a BarcodeDisplay renders the sample's unique ID as a visible 1D barcode (Code 128) with the human-readable identifier beneath in mono-data small text (e.g., 'SMPL-2026-00342'). Below the barcode sits the sample name in semibold text-sm with an optional species/type subline in body-muted. A LocationTag renders as a pill-shaped chip with a freezer-icon prefix showing storage position in mono-data format: 'FRZ-3 / Rack B / Box 4 / A3'. Beside it, an ExpiryBadge is color-coded by days remaining: emerald (>90 days), amber (30-90 days), red (<30 days), gray (expired/used). The badge shows the expiry date and a relative countdown ('28 days'). A StatusIcon sits in the top-right corner of each card indicating current state: available (green circle), checked-out (blue arrow-right), in-use (amber pulse dot), depleted (gray X), contaminated (red warning). A CustodyLog footer shows the most recent custody event with a small user avatar, action ('Accessed by J. Chen'), and timestamp ('2h ago'). Clicking a card opens a detail drawer with full custody history, freezer-cooldown logs, QC results, and derived-samples lineage. For freezer preset, cards arrange into a physical 9×9 grid mimicking cryobox layout with position labels (A1-I9) along edges and empty cells showing dashed borders. For timeline preset, SampleCards transform into horizontal rows with a vertical CustodyTimeline rail on the left; each custody event renders as a circular node on the rail with a connector line to the next event, with event details (user, action, timestamp) flowing to the right.

layout_hints.note: Sample tracking is regulatory-grade lab data (GLP/GMP compliant). Every access must be logged. Expiry dates must be visible and color-coded. Chain-of-custody cannot be edited after creation.
layout_hints.sample_card: SampleCard uses d-surface[data-interactive] with cursor:pointer. Minimum width 200px, maximum 280px. Internal padding 12px, gap 8px between sections.
layout_hints.expiry_colors: ExpiryBadge colors MUST be consistent: emerald (>90d), amber (30-90d), red (<30d), gray (expired). Colorblind-safe with icon prefixes (clock, warning, skull).
layout_hints.status_icons: StatusIcon uses d-annotation[data-status] in top-right corner 16px diameter. available=green, checked-out=blue, in-use=amber-pulse, depleted=gray, contaminated=red.
layout_hints.barcode_format: BarcodeDisplay renders actual scannable Code 128 or QR barcode (not decorative). Human-readable ID always visible beneath for manual entry fallback.
layout_hints.custody_immutability: CustodyLog entries are append-only. Display includes user avatar, action verb, and ISO timestamp. Never editable after creation — corrections require new custody entry.

slots.sample-grid: Responsive grid container holding SampleCards. Adapts column count based on viewport (2 mobile → 6 wide). Each cell contains one SampleCard.
slots.sample-card: Repeating slot — one per sample. Contains BarcodeDisplay, sample name, LocationTag, ExpiryBadge, StatusIcon, and CustodyLog preview. Clickable to open detail drawer with full history.
slots.barcode-display: Top of each sample card. Renders scannable 1D Code 128 or 2D QR barcode with human-readable ID beneath in mono-data small text.
slots.location-tag: Pill-shaped chip showing physical storage coordinates in format 'FRZ-N / Rack X / Box Y / Position'. Clickable to open freezer-map view at that location.
slots.expiry-badge: Color-coded pill showing expiry date and relative countdown (days remaining). Colors map to urgency thresholds with icon prefixes.
slots.status-icon: Top-right corner indicator showing current sample state: available, checked-out, in-use, depleted, contaminated. 16px diameter with consistent color mapping.
slots.custody-log-preview: Footer of each card showing most recent custody event (user avatar, action verb, timestamp). Links to full custody timeline on click.
slots.freezer-grid: Freezer-preset-only slot. Physical cryobox layout 9×9 grid with position labels A1-I9 along edges. Empty cells show dashed borders; occupied cells show SampleCard at reduced size.
slots.custody-timeline: Timeline-preset-only slot. Vertical rail of custody events per sample, each event as circular node with connector lines. Event details flow to right (user, action, timestamp, notes).

keyboard: Arrow keys: navigate between sample cards in grid

responsive.mobile: Grid collapses to 2 columns with SampleCards stacking vertically. BarcodeDisplay remains scannable. LocationTag truncates to freezer+box only. Custody log preview hidden, available via tap.
responsive.tablet: Grid renders 3-4 columns. All card sections visible. Freezer preset maintains 9×9 grid with horizontal scroll if needed.

micro.status-pulse: in-use amber dot opacity 0.5 to 1.0 to 0.5 1.5s ease-in-out infinite
micro.expiry-warning: ExpiryBadge red <7 days subtle shake 300ms every 10s

transitions.layout-swap: grid reflow 400ms ease-in-out between grid/freezer/timeline presets
transitions.custody-append: new custody event fade-in + slide-up 300ms ease-out

ambient.expiry-countdown: ExpiryBadge text updates live as days elapse

composition.SampleCard: Surface(d-surface, data-interactive) > [BarcodeDisplay + SampleName + LocationTag + ExpiryBadge + CustodyLogPreview + StatusIcon]
